def positive_mutable_default_argument():
    rule_id = "mutable_default_argument"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Function parameters that use mutable defaults such as [], {}, or set() directly in the signature."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
